narration_text: Now we'll see how all these concepts fit together, let's think about this together, considering the network as a whole system. Notice that the network edge and core work together to enable communication. I want you to focus on the image on the slide, look at the diagram on your slide, notice how the different components interact, the hosts, access networks, and physical media all play a role. Observe how the network core uses packet and circuit switching to manage data transmission. This visual representation helps illustrate the complex relationships between these elements, and as we move forward, we'll delve deeper into the specifics of protocol layers and service models, setting the stage for our next topic.
